file_id.description: Stable 20-digit numeric ID - canonical file identifier

dir_id.description: Directory ID - 20-digit ID of the parent directory from .dir_id file

bundle_id.description: 16-digit ID for bundle grouping (separate namespace from file_id)

bundle_key.description: Human-readable stable bundle name (e.g., GATE_AGGREGATE, ID_REGISTRY)

enforced_by_file_ids.description: List of file_ids that enforce this file

enforces_rule_ids.description: List of rule IDs this file enforces

test_file_ids.description: List of test file_ids for this file

repo_root_id.description: Logical root identifier for resolving relative_path

first_seen_utc.description: UTC timestamp when this record was first added to registry

created_by.description: Tool/user/process that created the registry record

is_generated.description: True if file is generated/derived artifact

path_aliases.description: Alternate paths or aliases for this file record

is_directory.description: True if this record represents a directory

geu_ids.description: List of Governance Enforcement Unit IDs associated with this file

is_shared.description: Whether file is shared across multiple GEUs

owner_geu_id.description: GEU ID of the owner if file is shared, otherwise null

primary_geu_id.description: Primary GEU ID responsible for this file, or null if not assigned

evidence_type.description: Kind of evidence used to substantiate the edge

evidence_locator.description: Pointer to evidence (file path + selector, command, workflow step id, etc.)

extract.description: Optional short extracted snippet or selector

status.description: Whether evidence was mechanically verified or is only claimed
